title: padus serrulata
intro: Padus serrulata, also known as the forsythia or Korean forsythia, is a deciduous shrub native to East Asia, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and dark green leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Padus serrulata include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used as a decoction or infusion, and can be found in various forms, including capsules, tablets, and teas.
